sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99371" key="sunapeuqu/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συναπ-ευθύνω</orth>, <sense id="n99371.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make straight together, help to guide</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.426c</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1027a</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:48:33:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">48.33.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
